basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal has released the official notification for 1 Project Technical Support II posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Madhya Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation for SC/ ST candidates will be applicable as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years’ Experience in relevant subject/field OR Three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field + two years of experience in a relevant subject
qualification.details: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years’ Experience in relevant subject/field OR Three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field + two years of experience in a relevant subject

selection_process: Written Test (if more than 30 candidates) Interview Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhopal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference. faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technical Support II position at AIIMS Bhopal is 15th June 2026. Ensure you complete all formalities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 12th in Science with a Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) and possess five years of experience, OR hold a three-year graduate degree in a relevant field with two years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support II post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the extracted data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, along with an additional 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support II position in the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (if more than 30 candidates apply), followed by an Interview, Document Verification, and the final Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Technical Support II at AIIMS Bhopal is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Bhopal located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462020.

faq.question: Q10. What is the date of the interview or written test?
faq.answer: The interview or written test for the Project Technical Support II recruitment is scheduled to be held on 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the specified time.
